_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: pS6 was most consistently elevated in vivo relative to normal tissues in radiation-induced tumors...several tumors showed proportionately more pS6 staining
details: Most consistently elevated in vivo relative to normal tissues in radiation-induced tumors, with some tumors showing proportionately more pS6 staining than pAkt
